title: Panaji, Goa — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]

Overview

Panaji is a city in Goa with a population of 100,000. The capital of Goa, a charming coastal city with Portuguese colonial architecture, scenic riverside promenades, and vibrant culture.
